description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly black body accented by bold red trim. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen, a control panel with a joystick and multiple colored buttons, and a coin slot area below. The marquee at the top displays the title 'House of the Bear' in a stylized, horror-themed red font. Both side panels are decorated with striking red graphics depicting a menacing bear silhouette and shadowy figures, reinforcing the cabinet's spooky theme. The rear panel is plain black with access panels and ventilation slots, typical for arcade machines. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and the cabinet stands at a height suitable for standing play.
description: A black and red upright arcade game cabinet with horror-themed 'House of the Bear' artwork, a screen, control panel, and coin slot. Side panels feature vivid graphics of a bear and shadowy figures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, and marquee with 'House of the Bear' title.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red-outlined silhouette of a bear and shadowy figures, with the marquee and control panel edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with access doors and ventilation slots, no artwork or controls visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same red bear and shadowy figure graphics and the cabinet's angular profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat rectangular, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and three colored buttons arranged in a row, plus a start button; control panel is black with colored controls.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'House of the Bear' in a red, horror-themed font on a black background, matching the side panel theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vivid red graphics of a menacing bear silhouette and shadowy figures, with the game title 'House of the Bear' in a horror-themed font.
